channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: One Starmer ally tells the FT: “Keir literally won by not being this version of the Labour party.” - Starmer's remaining allies dying as they lived, flatly in denial about how leftwing they are and how they won the 20...
item.description: One Starmer ally tells the FT: “Keir literally won by not being this version of the Labour party.” - Starmer's remaining allies dying as they lived, flatly in denial about how leftwing they are and how they won the 20...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Andy Burnham is sounding more and more like Starmer 2.0 - which increases the chances that 81 MPs will decide in the end to back a death or glory leadership challenge. Today's note:
item.description: Andy Burnham is sounding more and more like Starmer 2.0 - which increases the chances that 81 MPs will decide in the end to back a death or glory leadership challenge. Today's note:

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham faces Labour backlash over support for Waspi women
item.description: Burnham faces Labour backlash over support for Waspi women

item.title: FT UK Politics: Andy Burnham on Waspi women sounds rather like Starmer 2.0
item.description: Andy Burnham on Waspi women sounds rather like Starmer 2.0

item.title: The Telegraph: Makerfield by-election: Restore to hand Burnham victory, leaked poll suggests - The Telegraph
item.description: Makerfield by-election: Restore to hand Burnham victory, leaked poll suggests - The Telegraph

item.title: Bloomberg: Gilt Traders Brace for UK Vote With Burnham Eyeing Starmer’s Job - Bloomberg
item.description: Gilt Traders Brace for UK Vote With Burnham Eyeing Starmer’s Job - Bloomberg

item.title: LabourList: What would Andy Burnham do if he becomes Prime Minister?
item.description: What would Andy Burnham do if he becomes Prime Minister?

item.title: FT UK Politics: John Healey: the moderate battling for higher UK military spending

item.title: Sky News Politics: UK military chief writes to PM amid worry over defence spending plan
item.description: UK military chief writes to PM amid worry over defence spending plan
